guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (2022 amendment); FSA AML framework
records.pinpoint: AML — FATF travel rule operative; intermediary cold storage / trust segregation / liability-sharing

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Closed issuer trichotomy; distribution via registered EPIESP

records.instrument: Payment Services Act; FSA framework (by entity type)
records.pinpoint: Capital — by entity type (banking / funds-transfer / trust); no separate aggregate cap

records.instrument: Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI)
records.pinpoint: Cross-border data — APPI governs personal data and cross-border handling

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: EPIESP registration; disclosure and supervisory reporting

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Distribution — foreign tokens handled via a registered EPIESP holding JP reserves equal to customer holdings; foreign issuer may not issue/redeem/solicit to JP users

records.instrument: Payment Services Act commencement + FSA registrations (JPYC; USDC via SBI VC Trade)
records.pinpoint: Timeline — EPI 1 Jun 2023; USDC Mar 2025; Act 66/2025 Jun 2025; JPYC 27 Oct 2025; megabank trust token by FY2026

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Issuer pathway — closed trichotomy (bank / funds-transfer / trust); intermediation via registered EPIESP

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Monetary sovereignty — no cap; foreign tokens admitted via registered EPIESP holding JP reserves

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Yield — holders not remunerated; issuer earns reserve interest

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime)
records.pinpoint: Redemption — at par on demand; funds-transfer-type JPY 1,000,000 per-transfer cap

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime, in force 1 Jun 2023) as amended by Act No. 66 of 2025
records.pinpoint: Regulators — FSA single supervisor; Local Finance Bureaus by delegation

records.instrument: Payment Services Act; Act No. 66 of 2025 (trust-type backing relaxation)
records.pinpoint: Reserve/backing — full backing baseline; trust-type up to 50% short-term low-risk assets (Act 66/2025)

records.instrument: Payment Services Act (Electronic Payment Instruments regime); Financial Instruments and Exchange Act
records.pinpoint: EPI perimeter under the PSA vs. the FIEA securities perimeter

own_pending_events.title: Japan Act No. 66 of 2025 full enforcement (trust-type reserve relaxation)
Japan recognises equivalent foreign trust-type stablecoins as Electronic Payment Instruments (Cabinet Office Ordinance)

forward.supervisor_reading: JP's own pending change is accessibility-only (dated-empty-effect, inbound-recognition): it changes who may operate and which tokens are admissible within the live regime, without moving any feasibility class. Read JP's low class-sensitivity position as 'no class flip pending', not as 'nothing happening' (§3.10/§6). Separately, 2 inbound and 4 outbound corridor(s) reclassify when counterparts enact. Most exposed counterpart(s): KR (2), TW (2), UK (1), US (1).
